title: rosa × involuta var. doniana
intro: Rosa × involuta var. doniana, also known as Rosa doniana, is a rare and exotic species of rose plant that is native to the Mediterranean region. It is a hybrid of the Rosa involuta and Rosa canina, and is prized for its unique medicinal properties. The plant contains flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have been shown to have anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, providing a range of health benefits including reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Rosa doniana can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
